title: lespedeza bicolor var. higoensis
intro: Lespedeza bicolor var. higoensis, also known as Higo lespedeza, is a variety of the lespedeza bicolor plant, a type of climbing legume native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Lespedeza bicolor var. higoensis include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
